description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal trash bin with a heavily rusted and weathered exterior, suggesting long-term outdoor exposure. The surface is mottled with patches of orange-brown rust and gray corrosion, giving it a rugged, industrial appearance. Several hazardous material warning labels are affixed to one side, including a diamond-shaped chemical hazard sign, an explosive warning, and a color-coded NFPA label, indicating it may be used for industrial or chemical waste. The top of the bin is flat and appears to be made of the same corroded metal as the sides, with no visible openings, handles, or wheels. The bin is robust and likely quite heavy, designed to remain stationary in urban or industrial environments. Its utilitarian design and warning signage make it suitable for use in areas where hazardous waste disposal is required.
description: A large, rusted cylindrical metal trash bin with hazardous material warning labels and a flat, closed top. Its weathered surface and signage suggest use for industrial or chemical waste.
description_view_0: The front view shows the flat, rusted top and cylindrical body with no visible openings or handles.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the extensive rust and corrosion, with no labels or signage visible.
description_view_2: This view reveals several hazardous material warning labels, including a chemical hazard diamond and an explosive warning.
description_view_3: This angle shows more warning labels, including a large explosive hazard sign and part of the NFPA label.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: Hazardous material warning labels, including chemical hazard diamond, explosive warning, and NFPA label
